tasks.title: Investigate @fleet reference mechanism and create skills/fleet/SKILL.md skeleton
tasks.notes: Created skills/fleet/SKILL.md with valid frontmatter (name: fleet). Cross-skill reference mechanism: Claude Code resolves skill references by matching the name field in frontmatter to prose patterns like 'See the fleet skill'. Fallback documented: use explicit path 'See skills/fleet/SKILL.md' if loader doesn't auto-resolve.

tasks.title: Populate skills/fleet/SKILL.md with fleet mechanics extracted from PM skill
tasks.notes: Fully populated skills/fleet/SKILL.md with all fleet mechanics sections: Tool Boundaries, Dispatch Rules, Pre-dispatch Checks, Pre-flight Checks, Task Harness Delivery, Delivery Mechanics, Monitoring, Recovery Commands, Token Tracking, Git as Transport, Cleanup Commands, Permissions, Model Tiers, Member Icons, Provider Awareness. tasks.notes: Removed all inline fleet tool patterns from doer-reviewer.md: Setup items 2, 3, 4 reference fleet skill; Pre-flight Checks reference fleet skill; Flow steps 2, 3, 6 reference fleet skill; Post-dispatch Token Tracking replaced with one-liner; Safeguards table max_turns row trimmed; Permissions section references fleet skill; Git as transport .gitignore reference updated.

tasks.title: Verify the split is complete
tasks.notes: All checks passed: (1) skills/pm/ has no inline fleet tool usage instructions — only context mentions in plan-prompt.md; (2) skills/fleet/ has no PM workflow terms (APPROVED/CHANGES NEEDED/doer-reviewer loop/lifecycle); (3) all 7 files confirmed moved from skills/pm/ to skills/fleet/; (4) skills/fleet/SKILL.md has valid frontmatter (name: fleet); (5) cross-references are bidirectional — PM references fleet sections that all now exist in fleet/SKILL.md.

tasks.title: VERIFY checkpoint
tasks.notes: All Tasks 1-5 completed. skills/fleet/ contains SKILL.md plus 7 sub-documents. skills/pm/ contains only PM workflow files. Clean separation confirmed. Pushed to origin/sprint/skill-refactor for PM review.
